task_completion.description: The agent opened the segmentation tools and created a segmentation node.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Segment Editor module (or equivalent segmentation tool in the medical imaging software) is visible and active in the GUI, with at least one segment created in the segment list.

task_completion.description: The complete tumor region is segmented on the loaded brain MRI sequences.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Colored overlays (segmentation masks) are visible covering the abnormal tumor regions in the 2D slice views (Axial, Sagittal, and/or Coronal).

task_completion.description: A 3D visualization of the segmented tumor is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 3D rendered model of the segmented tumor is clearly visible in the 3D viewer pane of the application.
A save dialog, file explorer, or terminal window shows the segmentation file being saved or existing exactly at '~/Documents/SlicerData/BraTS/agent_segmentation.nii.gz'.

task_completion.description: The tumor volume in mL is reported to ~/Documents/SlicerData/BraTS/tumor_report.txt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor, terminal output (e.g., 'cat' command), or file creation dialog shows a file named 'tumor_report.txt' in the correct directory containing a numerical value representing the volume in mL.

integrity.description: The agent used the medical imaging software's GUI to perform the segmentation and visualization.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent actively clicking and interacting with the software's interface (e.g., 3D Slicer), rather than just executing a pre-written script in a terminal to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The segmentation was generated by the agent rather than loading a pre-existing ground truth file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent uses segmentation tools (like thresholding, drawing, or growing from seeds) rather than simply using a 'Load Data' dialog to open a file from a 'ground_truth' directory.

integrity.description: The reported volume is derived from the software's actual calculation tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: The software's statistics or measurement module (e.g., Segment Statistics) is visible in the screenshots, showing the calculated volume before it is written to the text file.
